text: In analyst actions, UBS lifted its price target on Amazon stock, signaling confidence in the company's strength and sparking a rally in shares. The positive analyst sentiment comes as Amazon appears well-positioned to benefit from rising demand for chips and AI tools, particularly as competitors like Google increase their AI spending. This positions Amazon to potentially capture incremental value from the broader AI infrastructure investment wave.
